bio: Detail-oriented civil engineer specializing in infrastructure development, structural analysis, and sustainable construction. Passionate about building resilient systems that support growing communities.
name: DAVID KIM
title: Civil Engineer

projects.title: Bridge Load Optimization Study
projects.description: Analyzed and optimized bridge load capacity to improve safety and durability.

projects.title: Sustainable Urban Drainage System
projects.description: Designed a drainage solution to reduce flooding and improve water management in urban areas.

projects.title: Highway Expansion Project
projects.description: Contributed to the planning and execution of a major highway expansion initiative.

Mentored students interested in engineering careers.

education.description: Focused on structural engineering, transportation systems, and environmental sustainability.
Developed practical skills in construction and infrastructure design.

highlights: Designed and managed infrastructure development projects.
Conducted site inspections and ensured compliance with regulations.

experience.description: Working on infrastructure projects that support urban growth and sustainability.

highlights: Assisted in site surveys and data collection.
Supported senior engineers in project planning.
experience.description: Gained hands-on experience in civil engineering projects and workflows.

highlights: Supported construction site operations and inspections.
